rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement is a major fresh domestic policy development affecting oil markets, financial portfolios, and US military posture — directly relevant to American daily life.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', stock markets surge
top_events.summary: Trump announces Iran deal and cancels planned strikes; markets rally sharply, oil prices shift — direct impact on US financial markets, retirement accounts, and gas prices.

top_events.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons at Guantánamo visit
top_events.summary: US defense secretary escalates rhetoric toward Cuba; signals potential new foreign policy pressure point close to US shores.

top_events.title: Man pleads guilty to slaying top Democrat and her husband in Minnesota
top_events.summary: Domestic political violence case with direct resonance for US political climate and safety of elected officials.
